# Musayr Formation

**Summary**: A major carbonate unit in the Midyan Basin.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] studied the musayr-formation to characterize its stratigraphic architecture and diagenetic history.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] marine carbonate platform

## Reservoir Properties



## Diagenetic History

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] micritization, cementation, and dolomitization

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Musayr Formation is unconformably underlain by Al-Wajh and conformally overlain by Burqan. ([[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015, p. 12]])
